title: Edaganathar temple
tagline: Edaganathar temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Edaganathar Temple (ஏடகநாதர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Thiruvedagam, a village in Madurai district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: Edaganathar Temple (ஏடகநாதர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Thiruvedagam, a village in Madurai district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The temple is located on the banks of Vaigai River. Shiva is worshipped as Edaganathar, and is represented by the lingam. His consort Parvati is depicted as Visalakshi.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Grizzled Squirrel Wildlife Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: The Grizzled Squirrel Wildlife Sanctuary (GSWS), also known as Srivilliputhur Wildlife Sanctuary, was established in 1988 to protect the Near threatened grizzled giant squirrel (Ratufa macroura). Occupying an area of 485.2 km2, it is bordered on the southwest by the Periyar Tiger Reserve and is one of the best preserved forests south of the Palghat Gap.

topPlaces.name: Kansapuram
topPlaces.description: Kansapuram is a village in the foothills of the Western Ghats in Virudhunagar District, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located 2 kilometres south of Koomapatti and 7 kilometres west of Watrap.

topPlaces.name: W. Pudupatti
topPlaces.description: W.Pudupatti is a panchayat town in Virudhunagar district, Tamil Nadu. It is under Srivilliputtur Assembly constituency and Tenkasi LokSabha constituency.

topPlaces.name: Koomapatti
topPlaces.description: Koomapatti or Koomapatty is a village in Watrap taluk of Virudhunagar district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located in the foothills of the Western Ghats, 5 kilometres (3.1 mi) west of Vathirairuppu.

topPlaces.name: Watrap block
topPlaces.description: Watrap block is a revenue block in the Virudhunagar district of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 27 panchayat villages.

topPlaces.name: Watrap
topPlaces.description: Vathirairuppu is a taluk in Virudhunagar District, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: South Kodikulam
topPlaces.description: South Kodikulam is a panchayat town in Virudhunagar district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Kalasalingam Academy of Research and Education
topPlaces.description: Kalasalingam Academy of Research and Education (KARE), formerly Arulmigu Kalasalingam College of Engineering and Kalasalingam University, is a private deemed to be university located in Krishnankoil near Rajapalayam in Tamil Nadu, India. The campus is close to the ancient temple town of Srivilliputhur.

items.note: The Grizzled Squirrel Wildlife Sanctuary (GSWS), also known as Srivilliputhur Wildlife Sanctuary, was established in 1988 to protect the Near threatened grizzled giant squirrel (Ratufa macroura). Occupying an area of 485.2 km2, it is bordered on the southwest by the Periyar Tiger Reserve and is one of the best preserved forests south of the Palghat Gap.
Kansapuram is a village in the foothills of the Western Ghats in Virudhunagar District, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located 2 kilometres south of Koomapatti and 7 kilometres west of Watrap.
W.Pudupatti is a panchayat town in Virudhunagar district, Tamil Nadu. It is under Srivilliputtur Assembly constituency and Tenkasi LokSabha constituency.
Koomapatti or Koomapatty is a village in Watrap taluk of Virudhunagar district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located in the foothills of the Western Ghats, 5 kilometres (3.1 mi) west of Vathirairuppu.
Watrap block is a revenue block in the Virudhunagar district of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 27 panchayat villages.
Vathirairuppu is a taluk in Virudhunagar District, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
South Kodikulam is a panchayat town in Virudhunagar district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

items.activity: Kalasalingam Academy of Research and Education
items.note: Kalasalingam Academy of Research and Education (KARE), formerly Arulmigu Kalasalingam College of Engineering and Kalasalingam University, is a private deemed to be university located in Krishnankoil near Rajapalayam in Tamil Nadu, India. The campus is close to the ancient temple town of Srivilliputhur.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Edaganathar temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Edaganathar temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Edaganathar temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Madurai Airport (62 km) and the nearest railway station is Madurai Junction (69 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Edaganathar temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Edaganathar temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Edaganathar temple?
faq.a: Stays in Edaganathar temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Edaganathar temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Grizzled Squirrel Wildlife Sanctuary, Kansapuram, W. Pudupatti, Koomapatti, Watrap block.
